Community Stories5 min read

Women in Agriculture Leadership

By Folake Adeniyi

March 28, 2024

Women play a critical role in agriculture, yet often face unique challenges in access to resources, credit, and market opportunities. At Oshanodes Agro, we're committed to empowering women farmers.

Our initiatives include: - Women-focused training programs - Access to credit and equipment financing - Women's farmer cooperatives - Leadership development - Fair pricing and guaranteed markets

Women bring innovation, resilience, and community focus to agriculture. When we empower women farmers, we create positive ripple effects across entire communities.

The women in our network are proof that gender equity and agricultural success go hand-in-hand.
